note: Curated additions for member/committee name resolution (P6). Same convention as bill_aliases.json / industry_lexicon.json: human-added entries with a source, versioned, precision over recall. nickname_pairs are GENERIC American first-name equivalences (promoted from the proven 2026-07-08 package matcher, out/packages/*/_build/enhance_giving.py); member_aliases maps a bioguide_id to extra full-name spellings seen in filings; committee_aliases maps a normalized recipient string (A-Z0-9 only) to an FEC committee_id when the filed string can't be matched mechanically.

member_aliases_sources.B001303: v1.1 2026-07-11: LD-203 filed honoree string 'LISA ROCHESTER' (drops 'Blunt'; unambiguous — no other Rochester in members_all); crypto diversified slice, $9,000/2 items
member_aliases_sources.M001232: v1.1 2026-07-11: LD-203 filed honoree string 'APRIL MCLAIN DELANEY' (misspells McClain; unambiguous full-person string); crypto ambient slice, $1,500/1 item
